name: promote
description: End-to-end product promotion strategy. Give /promote-strategist a URL, get a complete strategy package: positioning, offer audit, growth fits, channel mix, content pillars, GEO plan, instrumentation, 90-day calendar, and a YAML hand-off contract for the executor (Part 2, in development).

promote_home.title: Campaigns directory
promote_home.description: Where promote artifacts (campaigns) are written. Resolution order: 1) $PROMOTE_HOME env var, 2) ./campaigns/ relative to cwd (default), 3) ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/campaigns/ fallback if cwd is not writable.
